items.current_reality: Fixed. Package normalization created missing __init__.py files in release scope and filtered scan is now zero.
items.closure_criteria: Filtered package scan reports zero missing __init__.py directories.

items.reported_claim: 22 Python files contain UTF-8 BOM and can break runtime/tooling.
items.current_reality: Fixed. UTF-8 BOM was removed from all detected Python files; post-scan is zero.
items.closure_criteria: Filtered BOM scan reports zero Python files with BOM.

items.reported_claim: HUD v2 is QML-only and has no Python backend.
items.current_reality: Not accurate in current codebase. HUD v2 is loaded by ui/hud_qml/app_qml.py and bound to HUDController backend.

items.reported_claim: .env may contain real API secrets in shared artifact.
items.current_reality: Hardened for release packaging. .env is ignored and release builder now excludes .env/.env.* from distributable artifacts.
items.closure_criteria: Secret rotation completed, release packaging excludes .env, and documentation mandates .env.example workflow.

items.current_reality: Fixed. quick_panel_v2 now has Python backend (app/controller), official launcher command, and runtime smoke coverage.
items.closure_criteria: quick_panel_v2 has app/controller backend, official entrypoint, and end-to-end runtime smoke.

items.reported_claim: Optional dependencies can crash runtime paths.
items.current_reality: Critical optional-dependency crash paths were hardened (voice ImportError handling + CAD plugin lazy imports with clear guidance).
items.closure_criteria: Guard matrix shows all optional dependency paths handled with graceful fallback and tests pass.

items.reported_claim: Ollama availability/model readiness is not surfaced clearly.
items.current_reality: Fixed. Ollama health/model checks are exposed via IPC and surfaced in UI summaries with doctor evidence.
Fixed. Repository-level line-ending policy was added via editorconfig and gitattributes.
items.closure_criteria: Policy files added and normalization evidence recorded.

items.reported_claim: tmp pytest artifacts pollute repository tree.
items.current_reality: Fixed. tmp artifact patterns are ignored and temporary directories were cleaned from working tree root.
items.closure_criteria: Ignore policy includes all known tmp patterns and tree is cleaned/isolated.

items.reported_claim: workspace runtime data mixed with source tree.
items.current_reality: Fixed. workspace remains runtime data and is excluded from release package and ignore rules.
items.closure_criteria: N/A (ignore and dynamic workspace path already implemented).

items.reported_claim: GITHUB_API_KEY is present without active plugin usage.
items.current_reality: Clarified as config hygiene, not runtime blocker. Documentation now states GITHUB_API_KEY is unused unless explicit plugin is added.
items.closure_criteria: Either GitHub integration exists and is documented or key usage is removed/clarified.

items.reported_claim: Theme source is duplicated and can drift.
items.current_reality: Validated as intentional dual-theme architecture (legacy HUD v1 theme vs common UI theme for modern surfaces), not a runtime defect.
items.closure_criteria: Single theme source enforced or synchronization strategy documented and tested.
